title: East Industry - Modpack
description:
Modpack for my server. 

Based around create
body:
# East Industry Modpack

**Create-focused modpack with 100+ mods, visual enhancements, and included resource packs**

## 🏭 Overview

Industrial automation meets stunning visuals. Features the complete Create ecosystem with Valkyrien Skies physics, comprehensive food systems, and performance optimizations. Perfect for multiplayer servers.

**Key Features:**
* 20+ Create mods (Big Cannons, Steam Rails, New Age, Ore Excavation)
* Valkyrien Skies integration for moving structures
* Iris shaders + Distant Horizons + visual enhancements
* 10+ food mods (Farmer's Delight ecosystem)
* Performance optimized (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore)
* 3 included resource packs (Create Ultra, Fresh Animations, Fullbright)

## Mod Categories

**Create Suite (20+ mods)** 
Create, Big Cannons, Steam Rails, New Age, Jetpack

**Visual & Performance (15+ mods)**  
Iris, Sodium, Distant Horizons, Entity Culling

**Food & Farming (10+ mods)**  
Farmer's Delight + expansions, Cultural Delights

**Building & Decor (20+ mods)**  
Supplementaries, Design Decor, Decorative Blocks

**Utility & QoL (15+ mods)**  
JEI, Xaero's Maps, Waystones, Mouse Tweaks

**Physics & Engineering (5+ mods)**  
Valkyrien Skies, Create Connected, Trinkets

**Total: 100+ mods**

---
